title: March 2026: Liquidity Unification
snippet: SODAX (@gosodax): March 2026: Liquidity Unification Network Owned Liquidity Migration: The final tranches of ICON NOL move on March 2, unlocking the SODAX AMM. SODAX Save Unlocked: Once assets are positioned in underlying money markets, the SODAX Save frontend launch can move forward. LayerZero & St
